response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Audio phonetics and lyrics matched the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Hololive 5th Generation.
2. JSON Usage: Reference lyrics were utilized to ensure exact transcription accuracy of rapid vocal segments.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual cinematic cards in the atmospheric intros of both repeating segments. Applied strict audio-anchored boundaries for the vocals, ensuring instant transition timing to prevent cascading delays. No closed captions or sound tags are included.

subtitles.original: 聖なる夜
4つの星が、ひとつになるとき
奇跡が、はじまる。
さあ！
Hyper Jumpin' 飛び越えよう
ハイになって灰になるまで 楽しんできな
subtitles.english: Have fun until you get high and turn to ash!

subtitles.original: Hyper Jumpin' 海の向こうまでも
subtitles.english: Hyper Jumpin', even to the other side of the ocean!

subtitles.original: もっともっと近づきたいの
subtitles.english: I want to get closer and closer!

subtitles.original: Wow...
Gimme gimme gimme 愛
Wow...
もっともっと高く飛びたいの
subtitles.english: I want to fly higher and higher!

subtitles.original: Hyper Jumpin' now!
ここにいる。 手が触れそうなほど。
subtitles.english: Right here. So close you could almost touch them.
